---
title: "Measuring Technical Debt in Mission Critical Trading Systems"
subtitle: "A Service Level Quantitative Framework"
author: "Tobi Zeier"
supervisor: "Dr Zahid Ullah"
co-supervisor: "Doug Millward"
university: "University of Essex Online"
department: "Computing Department"
degree: "Master's Thesis"
logo: "university-logo.png"
---

\newpage

## Preface

(Write a short preface / declaration / abstract here, or leave this section empty for now.)
